inventory_use: Supplement master_sites with mapped marine nature-type occurrences and extent polygons; likely useful for eelgrass beds and larger kelp forest occurrences.
access_notes: Look for Geonorge metadata/download/WFS for Marine naturtyper HB19 and filter marine nature-type codes such as larger kelp forest occurrences.
notes: Highest-priority supplement because it can turn the inventory from literature points into mapped habitat units.

inventory_use: Discovery portal for Norwegian nature datasets including marine data from Miljødirektoratet, HI, NGU, Artsdatabanken and others.
access_notes: Use catalogue search terms in Norwegian and English: ålegras, ålegraseng, tareskog, marine naturtyper, verneområder.
notes: Use as an entry point for official Norwegian geodata before relying on broader European products.

inventory_use: Add site-context variables such as bathymetry, seabed terrain, sediment, bottom hardness, vulnerable habitats, currents, waves, salinity and temperature where pilot-area coverage exists.
access_notes: Coverage is not national yet; check pilot areas and product services through Kartverket/NGU/HI and Geonorge.
notes: Best supplement for restoration suitability and explaining site-level carbon variation where available.

inventory_use: Identify which Marine grunnkart layers are available and which fields can become standardized site-context attributes.
access_notes: Use this as documentation for selecting products before ingestion.
notes: Products include depth, terrain, sediment maps, anchoring conditions, vulnerable habitats and modeled oceanographic variables.

organization: European Marine Observation and Data Network
inventory_use: Supplement habitat and environmental context using EUSeaMap, survey habitat maps, survey sample points, specific habitat models and essential ocean variable products.
access_notes: Use EMODnet viewer/catalogue/download services; subset to Norwegian waters and intersect with canonical regions/site points.
notes: Useful broader-coverage fallback or complement to Norwegian national layers.

organization: European Marine Observation and Data Network
inventory_use: Find downloadable layers for modeled kelp, seagrass, macroalgal canopy, seabed habitat, light, depth, waves and currents.
access_notes: Use DataBox to identify exact product names and download options.
notes: Good source for modelled habitat layers and environmental variables needed for site screening.

organization: European Marine Observation and Data Network
inventory_use: Add spatial pressure overlays for dredging, shipping, aquaculture, cables, pipelines, ports, hydrocarbon extraction and other marine activities.
access_notes: Use as pressure proxies only; these layers describe activity intensity/location, not direct ecosystem impact.
notes: Directly supports roadmap pressure/readiness analysis.

organization: European Marine Observation and Data Network / OpenDataSoft
inventory_use: Calculate vessel-density pressure near inventory sites or mapped habitat polygons by month/year and vessel class.
access_notes: Download GeoTIFF/grid layers; aggregate to buffers around sites or canonical regions.
notes: Useful for shipping and anchoring/disturbance proxy, but not a direct ecological impact measure.

organization: European Marine Observation and Data Network / OpenDataSoft
inventory_use: Add proximity/intensity context for offshore oil and gas infrastructure around sites and regions.
access_notes: Filter to Norway and active/current status where appropriate.
notes: Useful for national pressure context; likely less relevant for shallow eelgrass sites than vessel/dredging layers.

organization: Nordic Council of Ministers / NIVA / partners
inventory_use: Strengthen national and regional synthesis values for extent, carbon budget, carbon stock and sequestration assumptions.
access_notes: Extract tables carefully into national_summary/regional_summary records with units and uncertainty fields.
notes: Already partially represented in the macroalgae workbook; should be normalized more explicitly across all ecosystems.

source_name: Nordic Blue Carbon Project online report
inventory_use: Machine-readable companion source for extracting tables and checking citations from TemaNord 2020:541.
access_notes: Use online report for easier table review; cite DOI/publication metadata from report.
notes: Good for reproducible table extraction if PDF parsing is messy.

source_name: Gagnon et al. 2024 Norwegian eelgrass carbon stocks
inventory_use: Core seagrass site-level source for carbon stocks, environmental gradients and coordinates; continue mining supplementary data for missing fields.
access_notes: Supplementary Table S1 already used for seagrass coordinates; review all supplementary tables before adding more fields.
notes: Most important site-level seagrass carbon-stock paper for Norway.

source_name: Gundersen et al. 2021 Norwegian kelp biomass and ecosystem services
inventory_use: Add kelp biomass, area, carbon stock, export and sequestration estimates by ecoregion/depth where possible.
access_notes: Tables and supplementary material likely need manual or scripted extraction; preserve model assumptions and uncertainty.
notes: Key macroalgae supplement with 630 scuba samples and national kelp forest estimates.

inventory_use: Track newer drone-based mapping outputs for seagrass, kelp, rockweed and substrate classes; potential future site/polygon additions.
access_notes: Check SeaBee data portal/report for public datasets and access constraints.
notes: Important future-facing monitoring source, but may require data-access follow-up.

inventory_use: Add candidate Larvik/Ølbergholmen seagrass monitoring/test sites and track forthcoming mapped products.
access_notes: Article gives field-site context and approximate coordinates; confirm datasets before treating as formal observations.
notes: Useful lead for expanding beyond Gagnon site set once data products are available.

inventory_use: Potential portal for discovering SeaBee datasets, maps, documents and analysis products.
access_notes: Open portal and inventory public layers; record license and access status before ingestion.
notes: Use to check whether SeaBee-derived habitat products are publicly downloadable.

inventory_use: Add regional/national biodiversity and ecological-condition context for co-benefit/readiness sections.
access_notes: Better suited to regional or national synthesis than site-level inventory.
notes: Useful for co-benefit framing and ecological condition, not direct blue-carbon site measurement.

inventory_use: Download Nature Index values and indicator data for coastal waters to supplement co-benefit and ecological condition tables.
access_notes: Data are open under CC-BY 4.0; cite dataset DOI from download page.
notes: Good next step if we add a policy/co-benefit evidence table.

organization: UiT The Arctic University of Norway
inventory_use: Potential source for mapped marine habitats from Bodø, Vega, Smøla and Larvik, including eelgrass, seaweed communities, kelp forests and rocky seabeds.
access_notes: Check publications/data links/GitHub repositories from project page before ingestion.
notes: Strong candidate for supplementing site inventory with newer remote-sensing training/validation sites.

inventory_use: Compute spatial overlap between Norwegian MPAs and inventory sites or modeled habitat polygons; closes the explicit MPA-overlap gap noted in the roadmap (27 MPAs ~6173 km² with eelgrass overlap unquantified).
access_notes: Free shapefile/GDB country subset; intersect with eelgrass and kelp polygons; pair with Norwegian Verneområder for higher-resolution national MPAs.
notes: Directly addresses a roadmap-flagged gap; global coverage useful as a fallback or for cross-Nordic comparison.

inventory_use: Authoritative Norwegian polygons for national parks, nature reserves, marine protected areas and Ramsar sites; higher resolution than WDPA for domestic analysis.
access_notes: Search Geonorge catalogue for verneomraader; download shapefile/GeoJSON; verneform attribute distinguishes MPA categories.
notes: Will resolve named case-study sites such as Sørkjosleira and Kobbevågen as Ramsar polygons and quantify the MPA / eelgrass overlap that the roadmap flags as unquantified.

source_name: Copernicus Marine Service - Nordic Seas reanalysis and forecasting
inventory_use: Source SST climatology and marine heatwave (MHW) frequency, duration and intensity layers per Hobday et al. classification for the Norwegian shelf and fjords; closes the no-Norway-specific-MHW gap flagged in the roadmap.
access_notes: Free CMEMS account; NetCDF download (NWSHELF or ARCTIC products); compute MHW indices with the marineHeatWaves Python package or xmhw.
notes: Highest-leverage climate dataset; produces a regionalized pressure layer instead of relying on global qualitative claims about warming.

inventory_use: National-scale seabed mapping (depth, substrate, biotope, sensitive habitats) covering most of the Norwegian shelf; complements Marine grunnkart i kystsonen which is pilot-area only.
access_notes: Open WMS/WFS via Geonorge and downloadable layers per area.
notes: Provides shelf-scale benthic context that Marine grunnkart cannot yet supply outside pilot areas.

inventory_use: Add eutrophication and water-quality drivers (chlorophyll-a, dissolved nutrients, turbidity, oxygen, secchi) as site-context attributes for inventory points and canonical regions.
access_notes: Open access; web portal export or API; coastal stations near eelgrass and kelp sites are most relevant.
notes: Direct support for pressure analysis in Step 1 and explains site-level variation in Steps 2-3; complements NINA Nature Index by providing measurement-level data instead of a derived index.

source_name: Havforskningsinstituttet kelp forest monitoring (Christie / Norderhaug program)
inventory_use: Long-term Saccharina latissima and Laminaria hyperborea transect monitoring across Skagerrak, Mid-Norway and Northern Norway; fills the absence of multi-decadal kelp time series in the workbook.
access_notes: Contact HI for raw access; published synthesis in Christie et al. 2009 and follow-on papers; some data deposited in NMDC.
notes: Adds the temporal dimension currently missing from the kelp inventory and supports permanence and climate-risk arguments in Step 3.

inventory_use: Authoritative Norwegian aquaculture facility coordinates (salmon and other species) with operational status; serves as a local nutrient-loading and physical-disturbance pressure proxy near eelgrass and kelp sites.
access_notes: Open data; downloadable site list with WGS84 coords; filter to active marine cage sites.
notes: Higher resolution and Norwegian-authoritative compared to the EMODnet aquaculture layer.

inventory_use: Regional climate projections (SST, salinity, precipitation, runoff, sea-level) for Norwegian shelf and coast; supports Step 3 climate-risk and Step 5 implementation discussion.
access_notes: Open data; gridded projections under CMIP-aligned scenarios; downloadable per region/parameter.
notes: Useful for projecting future habitat suitability and pairing observed MHW frequency with future trajectories.

inventory_use: Additional fishing-effort pressure layer separated by gear type (bottom trawl, set-gillnet, longline) as a complement to EMODnet vessel density.
access_notes: Free API and downloadable daily 0.01-degree gridded effort by gear class.
notes: Partly redundant with EMODnet vessel density but separates fishing gear types, useful for trawl-disturbance proxy specifically.
